name: FabricCatalystStateDeploy
description: Enforces governance rules (domain assignment, capacity, RBAC) across Microsoft Fabric workspaces using a JSON state map.
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection used to obtain tokens for the Fabric and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: organizationName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps organization name (the part after dev.azure.com/).

inputs.name: projectName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps project containing the state JSON file.

inputs.name: repositoryName
inputs.label: Repository Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Repository that holds the state JSON file.

inputs.name: sourceBranchName
inputs.label: Source Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Branch from which to read the state JSON file.

inputs.name: deploymentDirectoryPath
inputs.label: Deployment Directory Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path in the repository to the folder containing the state JSON file.

inputs.name: jsonMapFileName
inputs.label: State JSON File Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the JSON file that defines the governance rules.

inputs.name: whatIf
inputs.label: What-If (dry run)
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, evaluates all rules and reports what would change without making any modifications. Run in What-If mode first to validate your rule set.

inputs.name: remove
inputs.label: Remove non-compliant workspaces
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, workspaces matched by a rule under the remove path are deleted. Has no effect unless What-If is also disabled.

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log.
